title: Malaysian-Style Baked Fish
description: A flavorful and spicy keto-friendly fish dish, inspired by Malaysian cuisine. This recipe is perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the salmon fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
In a small bowl, mix together the ginger, curry powder, and a pinch of salt.
Brush the mixture evenly onto both salmon fillets.
Drizzle the coconut milk over the salmon, making sure they're fully coated.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
Serve hot, garnished with sliced green onions if desired.
